reviews.comment:
Servicio de playero excelente el bar un desastre la empleadas a 2130 horas te dicen que apagaron a cocina y no te hacen un tostado porque cierran a las 2200hs
Las empleadas lo están perjudicando al dueño SON DE LO PEOR que  pongan Full Service. Ni a los socios se dignan a atender

(Translated by Google)
The beach service was excellent, but the bar was a disaster. The employees told me at 9:30 PM that the kitchen was off and refused to make me a toasted sandwich because they close at 10:00 PM.
The employees are hurting the owner's business. They are the worst. They should offer full service. They don't even bother to serve the members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25RMlR6RXdXakJTYUhWMmEwbGxWSEppYW0xM1ZVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Anoche 20.30 quisimos pedir 3 cafés.....
"Se nos terminó"
Sin palabras

(Translated by Google)
Last night at 8:30 pm we wanted to order 3 coffees...
"We're out."
Speechless

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos el mal entendido. La maquina de cafe estaba siendo purgada,fue explicada la situacion y se le ofreció otras alternancia como te. Nuestro personal no utiliza esas palabras para expresarse. Saludos

reviews.comment:
Fui a realizar un trámite y me atendieron de maravillas, me quedé a merendar precios razonables y muy buena atención de playeros y del servicvimpras me dieron ganas de asociarme... Pregunté x Martín y se ocupó.

(Translated by Google)
I went to do some paperwork and they treated me wonderfully. I stayed for a snack, the prices were reasonable, and the service from the beach attendants and the Servicvimpras staff was excellent. It made me want to become a member... I asked for Martín and he took care of it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5bVgyWllhWGh3Y21kcVpFZGxVbkJ5VURWblFrRRAB
